subject: [PATCH 20/24] nfsd: add a fi_connectable flag to struct nfs4_file

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds a new flag, fi_connectable, to the nfs4_file structure in the Linux NFS server. The flag indicates whether a filehandle is connectable or not, which is necessary for encoding filehandles in certain situations, such as CB_NOTIFY operations. The patch modifies the nfsd4_file_init function to set this flag based on the export flags of the underlying directory delegation.
